data.title: Coinbase offers access to Solana DEX, allowing trading of any Solana token without formal listing as CeFi and DeFi merge.
data.description: Coinbase has recently connected to Solana's rapidly expanding DeFi ecosystem, enabling users to trade any Solana token through DEX rails without the need for a formal listing process. This integration aims to provide users with more flexibility and access to the numerous tokens available on Solana's platform. This move reflects the increasing popularity and adoption of Solana in the market.

data.title: Temu collaborates with 1,500+ brands to enhance trademark protection, IP enforcement on and off platform.
data.description: Temu, the global online marketplace based in Boston, has recently announced its collaboration with over 1,500 brands as part of its Brand Guardian Initiative. Launched on December 11, 2025, this initiative aims to enhance intellectual property (IP) protection both on and off the platform. By directly partnering with a significant number of brands, Temu is taking a proactive approach to safeguarding IP rights and fostering a more secure online environment.

data.title: Eli Lilly's obesity drug showed 23.7% weight loss in trial, stock rose.
data.description: Eli Lily's shares surged past a significant threshold following the announcement that their new obesity treatment has shown impressive results in a recent phase three trial, resulting in a weight loss of 23.7%. This data marks a significant achievement for the company in the fight against obesity.

data.title: Garry Ridge showed humility as WD-40 CEO since 1997, took a DISC profile test, per Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: In 1997, Garry Ridge assumed the role of chief executive at WD-40. Following this, he underwent a personality assessment known as the DISC profile. Ridge's leadership style at WD-40 has been shaped by his humility, as outlined in a recent article from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Digital Currency X Technology Inc. acquires $1 billion EdgeAI tokens at 20% discount, treasury now exceeds $1.4 billion.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, Digital Currency X Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: DCX) revealed the accomplishment of acquiring $1 billion worth of EdgeAI tokens. This acquisition, disclosed on November 24, 2025, was finalized at a 20% lower rate than the market value, leading to an instant value of around $200 million. This acquisition has boosted the Company's digital asset treasury holdings to more than $1.4 billion, showcasing significant growth in its cryptocurrency custody and storage infrastructure services.

data.title: Copenhagen Airports A/S receives notice from Kingdom of Denmark regarding mandatory tender offer.
data.description: Copenhagen Airports A/S has announced today that the Kingdom of Denmark, through the Ministry of Finance, has delivered a notice to the company.

data.title: 7-Eleven debuts new holiday merch collection, offering festive gear for fans to celebrate in style.
data.description: 7-Eleven fans are in for a festive treat this holiday season, as the popular convenience retailer has unveiled its latest collection designed to bring holiday cheer. The new merch drop includes various items crafted to enhance the season's celebrations. This announcement comes from 7-Eleven, Inc. based in Irving, Texas on December 11, 2025. As the largest convenience retailer globally, 7-Eleven is set to spread joy with these new releases. Get ready to celebrate in true 7-Eleven style with these holiday-themed pieces.

data.title: Broe Group adds John Hayes and Alex Darden to board, founded in 1972 by Pat Broe, a multibillion-dollar investment company.
data.description: In Denver on December 11, 2025, The Broe Group, a well-established investment firm with a total worth of billions of dollars founded in 1972 by Pat Broe, announced the appointment of John Hayes and Alex Darden as growth and operations leaders to The Broe Family Board. This governing board, responsible for coordinating synergies and strategies, will now benefit from the expertise and leadership of these two new additions.

data.title: Quality HVAC company in Tulsa advises homeowners to ready homes for winter to ensure safety, comfort.
data.description: In preparation for the upcoming winter season, Tulsa's Quality Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electric experts are offering valuable maintenance advice to ensure families remain safe, comfortable, and stress-free. Based in Glenpool, this reputable company specializes in HVAC, plumbing, and electric services. These tips aim to assist households in maintaining their systems effectively throughout the colder months. Staying proactive with maintenance can potentially save homeowners hundreds of dollars in repair costs and ensure their homes are properly insulated against the frigid weather. With their expertise in the field, the team at Quality Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electric is encouraging residents to take preventive measures now to avoid any unforeseen issues. By implementing these recommendations, families can enjoy a cozy and worry-free winter season.

data.title: Altria Group CEO Billy Gifford retires; Sal Mancuso appointed successor in Richmond, VA. #Altria #CEOretirement
data.description: Richmond, Virginia-based Altria Group Inc. has disclosed the retirement of CEO Billy Gifford. Sal Mancuso has been appointed as the successor to Gifford. The transition in leadership comes as the company aims to steer its trajectory in the tobacco industry. Gifford's departure marks a significant change for the company with an annual revenue of approximately $25 billion. Mancuso's appointment as CEO is anticipated to bring new strategies and insights to Altria, a leading player in the global market. This decision reflects the company's commitment to adapt to evolving market dynamics and drive growth in the future.

data.title: H. Yturria Ranch launches luxury brand, ShopHYTurria.com offers Texas-made apparel & decor inspired by 167 years of heritage.
data.description: In Houston, the historic H. Yturria Ranch has launched H. Yturria Ranch Mercantile, a luxury brand showcasing Texas heritage from its 167 years of existence. The brand's collection includes locally made clothing, handcrafted ranch items, and elegant home decor reflective of the ranch's sprawling 14,000 acres in Raymondville. The products are now on sale at ShopHYTurria.com and in stores starting this Saturday.
